calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-27-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kyla Cannon appeared by zoom in propria persona.

The court noted that there were issues with the petition for which the examiner had been trying to communicate with Ms. Cannon about to get this on track. Ms. Cannon stated that it is just personal property, that it is just her and her brother, that they received some bills and that she wants to make they are taken care of. Ms. Cannon also stated that she wants to make sure the personal property is divided equally with her brother, that she is in New Mexico and that her brother is in California. The court explained the threshold of the small estate affidavit, the ability to use it, and where she can find the forms and information. The Petition for Letters of Administration is off calendar.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
